DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF NG SOLUTIONS, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED. DEFENDANT SHALL WITHIN TWENTY DAYS OF THE DATE OF ORDER PROVIDE VERIFIED CODE-COMPLAINT RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, EXCEPT AS TO PRIVILEGE IN WHICH CASE DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE A CODE-COMPLIANT PRIVILEGE LOG. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF SANCTIONS FOR DISCOVERY ABUSE IN THE AMOUNT OF $1250 WITHIN TWENTY DAYS OF THE DATE OF ORDER. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302)

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Strom Esq. 310-453-5053 of Verus Law Group for Plaintiff NG SOLUTIONS, LLC. through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff requests for an additional 50 hours on fees. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NG SOLUTIONS, LLC, AN OHIO LIMITED LIABILITY's MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES.

Plaintiff Ng Solutions, L.L.C.'s motion for an award of attorney's fees is granted. Ng Solutions is awarded fees in the amount of $18,000 against defendant Samuel Levin for 90 hours of work. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, mtorreano@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling with a modification on the amount as follows:

PLAINTIFF NG SOLUTIONS, LLC, AN OHIO LIMITED LIABILITY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Of Issues.

Order and Judgment are signed.(see scanned order for details)

Off Calendar Aug-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Mark Strom of the law offices of Verus Law Group (310-453-5053) appears via telephone as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF NG SOLUTIONS, LLC'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One and Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. The motion is unopposed. Defendant shall within twenty days of the date of order provide verified code-complaint responses to plaintiff's request for production of documents, set one, without objections, except as to privilege in which case defendant shall provide a code-compliant privilege log. Defendant shall pay plaintiff sanctions for discovery abuse in the amount of $1250 within twenty days of the date of order. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
